question: How to install the camera battery when another one is power off?
content:
Load a fully charged BP-511A battery pack into the camera.
1. Slide the battery-compartment lever in the arrow direction and open the cover.<PIC>
2. Hold the battery with its contacts pointed downward, then insert it into the compartment until it locks into place.<PIC>
3. Close the cover and press it until it snaps shut.<PIC>
Battery Pack BP-514, BP-511, or BP-512 can also be used.

notes: Answered from the Canon EOS 20D main battery installation section. Question 286 separately covers the date/time battery, so this answer uses the BP-511A installation procedure.
